dict.string: Sentio uses your location to detect when you're home and adjust your smart home accordingly.
Sentio uses your location to detect when you're home and adjust your smart home accordingly.
Sentio monitors your activity and AirPods head position to make smarter home automation decisions — like dimming lights when you're falling asleep.
Sentio reads your HomeKit devices to show their status and help the Mac server control them.
Sentio uses speech recognition to listen for your replies when the AI speaks to you through AirPods.
Sentio reads your Focus mode to avoid interruptions — like silencing voice announcements during Do Not Disturb.
Sentio uses the microphone to capture your voice when replying to spoken messages from the AI assistant.
